judge_result.short_rationale: Core required action is present: immediate eye irrigation with eyelids open for at least 15 minutes, followed by medical escalation. However, the source specifically requires consulting an eye specialist, while the answer weakens this to hospital/doctor. It also adds contact lens removal and no-drops/no-rubbing advice not grounded in the provided truth.
